name: Udyog Mitra — Karnataka Industrial Incentives Package
administered_by: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Karnataka
retrieval_text: Udyog Mitra is the single-window facilitation and incentive package for manufacturing MSMEs in Karnataka under the New Industrial Policy 2020-25. Benefits include power tariff concessions, exemption from stamp duty and registration charges on industrial land, entry tax exemption on plant and machinery, concessional water charges, and price preference in Karnataka government procurement. A capital investment subsidy of up to 25% (capped at Rs 25 lakh for micro and small units) is available based on investment category and district. This scheme has no direct loan component; it provides a package of fiscal concessions to reduce the cost of setting up or expanding a manufacturing enterprise in Karnataka.
documents_required: Land/Property Documents (Sale Deed/Lease Agreement) for industrial plot in Karnataka
Machinery Purchase Invoices/Bills and Installation Certificates
Bank Account Details (Cancelled Cheque/Bank Passbook Copy)
Karnataka State Pollution Control Board (KSPCB) Consent for Operation (CFO) / Consent for Establishment (CFE)
Board Resolution (for Companies/LLPs) / Authorization Letter (for Proprietorships/Partnerships)
Declaration/Undertaking stating eligibility and compliance with New Industrial Policy 2020-25 conditions
